payload.answer: I parsed this as a request to inspect memory mem_123. I do not have access to the Brain memory store in this context, so I cannot verify whether mem_123 exists or display its contents. No durable memory was created, changed, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The command references memory id mem_123, but no memory contents or backing-store result was provided to inspect.

repair_options: Provide the stored record for mem_123 so it can be inspected.
Enable or query the Brain memory backend, then rerun /brain inspect memory mem_123.
If mem_123 was deleted or superseded, inspect its audit/tombstone record instead of treating it as current.
